narratives.evidence_quote: इसका अंदाजा सभी को है कि अगर ऐसा होता है तो यह पूर्ण पैमाने पर तीसरे विश्व युद्ध से बस एक कदम दूर होगा.
narratives.reasoning: The text explicitly forecasts that a direct confrontation between Russia and NATO could lead to a full-scale World War III.

narratives.evidence_quote: परमाणु युद्ध का हर किसी को है अंदाजा
narratives.reasoning: The text uses language that evokes fear of nuclear war and escalation, aiming to provoke anxiety about severe consequences.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस-NATO तीसरे विश्व युद्ध से बस एक कदम दूर.... इससे हार मानते हुए सब कुछ संभव है, जैसे कि परमाणु युद्ध की चेतावनी भी दी गई है
subnarratives.reasoning: The text frames the Russia-NATO confrontation and warnings of a potential World War III and nuclear conflict. This supports the broader war-outcome speculation narrative but does not fit the more specific subnarratives about army collapses or territorial losses, hence it is categorized as 'Other'.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: By continuing the war we risk WWIII
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इसका अंदाजा सभी को है कि अगर ऐसा होता है तो यह पूर्ण पैमाने पर तीसरे विश्व युद्ध से बस एक कदम दूर होगा. मुझे लगता है कि शायद ही इसमें किसी की दिलचस्पी होगी.
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote explicitly warns that if the ongoing conflict continues or escalates, it would bring the world to the brink of a full-scale WWIII, aligning with the subnarrative that continuing the war risks global war.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: परमाणु युद्ध का हर किसी को है अंदाजा
subnarratives.reasoning: The line explicitly asserts that there is a general awareness or inevitability about nuclear war, supporting fear-based narrative about potential nuclear use.
